overall.description: Cinematic footage from a fantasy video game showing students in wizard robes gathered on castle grounds, transitioning to a high-speed aerial flight along Gothic castle ramparts past house banners and colorful towers.

agents.ego_description: standing still on the grass observing fellow students gathered near the castle wall

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes holding a broomstick and looking around
two students conversing near the edge of the frame

entered.detail: tall stone wall with vertical red and gold striped banners hanging down
tall wooden observation tower with platform and red accents
pointed stone towers and spires of the main castle keep
strings of triangular pennant flags strung between towers

segments.scene_description: A static ground-level view of castle grounds with students in wizard robes standing on a grassy field. The scene features a large stone wall with red and gold banners, a wooden observation tower, and Gothic castle spires visible in the background under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of castle ramparts and towers

events.description: camera transitions from ground level to aerial flight, passing a large green house banner
camera accelerates along the castle wall, revealing colorful tower rooftops

agents.ego_description: flying swiftly on a broomstick or magical mount along the castle ramparts, passing house banners and towers

entered.detail: large vertical green tapestry with silver serpent emblem and fringed edges
crenellated stone defensive walls with wooden hoardings
series of towers with orange, green, and red conical roofs

segments.scene_description: The camera lifts into the air and moves rapidly along the castle exterior, passing a large green Slytherin house banner. The view reveals extensive Gothic ramparts with wooden hoardings and a series of colorful towers with conical roofs stretching into the distance, with mountains visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot begins as a grounded observation of a wizarding academy that rapidly transforms into a high-speed aerial sweep of its Gothic architecture. It starts at ground level on a grassy field where students in robes gather before a massive stone wall adorned with red and gold banners. As the camera lifts suddenly into the air, the perspective shifts from the static courtyard to a rapid glide along the castle exterior, passing a large green house banner. The scene then expands to reveal the full scale of the ramparts and wooden hoardings, racing past a series of colorful conical towers that stretch toward a distant mountain range under a partly cloudy sky.
